screen_metadata.name: Employee Master Organization Chart & Profile Command Vault

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px corporate personnel directory split grid framework)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Split Horizon Work Area (Left Pane Column: Dynamic search-optimized Employee Directory Tree and Department Node selector; Center Broad Panel Workspace: Interactive 2D SVG Node Organization Chart Canvas or structural Tiered Grid View; Right Sidebar Context Panel: Detailed Employee Personnel File, Cost-Center Allocation Sheet, and Active System Role Provisioning Console)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains parallel organizational graph panels and secure profile tabs side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The interactive org chart canvas scales down automatically, forcing the right profile details sheet into a slide-out right drawer panel to retain form field legibility)

key_visible_sections.title: Secure Employee Personnel Record Command Panel

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active HR administrator or supervisor security access clearance tokens -> Inherit multi-tenant corporate branch isolation profiles -> Execute state request payload fetch from HumanResourceService.getEmployees()
user_progression_routes.on_employee_node_click: Asynchronously query background databases to pull payroll cost tracking codes, skill inventory tallies, and cross-domain system permissions metadata maps to hydrate profile workspaces

redirection_rules.condition: If an active employee's internal security status parameter marks them as completely terminated or suspended from active system operations
redirection_rules.action: Deactivate inline access provisioning control triggers buttons, shade parent cell profile components layout properties to ash gray, and flag status markers to 'Access Revoked - Profile Locked'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action command selector link button element 'btn_onboard_personnel'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center multi-step onboarding wizard dialog window capturing raw legal names strings, tax identifiers validation rules, cost center codes routing keys, and initial monthly salary distribution fields forms

atoms.type: Semantic UI Token Pill Label Indicator
Semantic UI Token Pill Label Indicator
Tabular Intercepting Numeric Input Box Form Component

molecules.composition: Combines personnel thumbnail image asset + full name string title + corporate role description label + cost center allocation tag + conditional status pill indicator token element
Combines vector bounding layout box frame + interactive collapse child nodes chevron emblem + text row titles lines + inner direct reporting count numerical bubble element

organisms.composition: High-density vertical scrolling stack list mapping active internal corporate resources, managing multi-tier alphanumeric search parsing queries scripts instantly.

Unified vertical multi-tab input worksheet housing secure fields groupings including banking wire instructions form strings, tax accounting compliance parameters cells, and a structural direct-line supervisor relationship tree picker tool.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced style applied strictly across banking account fields, tax ids numbers, and salary data grids to protect vertical layout rows balancing grids maps)

scales.profile_header_title_emphasis: font-size: 1.375rem (22px) | font-weight: 700 | line-height: 1.5rem | tracking: letter-spacing tight

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.hr_anchor_indigo: #6366F1 (Indigo Blue HR Domain Resource Mapping Core Accent Focus Hue)
color_palette_hex.status_active_teal: #10B981 (Emerald Green Compliant Verification Active Workforce Pill Token Line)
color_palette_hex.status_locked_gray: #64748B (Slate Gray Subdued Personnel Metadata Typography Accent Row Labels)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard component catalog dashboard layout frame margins padding unit metrics)
spacing_and_borders.org_node_tree_gap: 1.25rem (20px separation space parameter mapping boundaries separating nodes components lines within graphing layout grids)
spacing_and_borders.border_radius_tokens: 0.375rem (6px modern precise clean structural geometric corner slices parameters)

outline tracking boundary maps box frame border line to 2px solid #3B82F6 using an instant 80ms calculation speed timing constraint

local_reactive_state_variables.active_employee_profile_focus_id: Tracks target captured directory list index row dataset primary lookup token code string identifier key used to inflate secure workspaces dashboards fields (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_onboarding_wizard_visible: Boolean state variable tracking presentation configurations parameters toggling new personnel registration wizard form overlays dialog windows structures
local_reactive_state_variables.directory_text_filter_query: String variable tracking character search variables evaluating string character matches across employee names data arrays instantly

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance session multi-tenant company context parameters tracking codes configurations cross runtime execution scopes
global_application_context_bindings.auth_rbac_user_clearance_level_token: Global security context allocation monitoring user role-based access tokens parameters locally to restrict view visualization capabilities over secure salary attributes fields parameters

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous recursive loop module scripts parsing custom styling definitions without external d3 or heavy layout diagram plugins scripts libraries requirements
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Executing full structural list calculations or processing recursive hierarchy tree node rendering operations over a deep nested 1,000 node employee graph layout matrix table must recalculate DOM fields modifications frames updates under a target threshold limit parameter of 15ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched secure personal file data structures direct mapping fields records inside local employee_personnel_records_vault_canvas data sheet caches views arrays, and pass active index lookup keys values straight forward into active_employee_profile_focus_id parameter flag modifiers

Emit registration transaction log variables; append successfully generated record item parameters maps back inside employee_directory_records_dataset local display cache views arrays blocks; trigger system closures over wizard fields layer elements variables flags parameters
